title: callicarpa pentandra f. hexandra
intro: Callicarpa pentandra f. hexandra, also known as the purple fruit vine or dragon fruit vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa pentandra f. hexandra include its potential to reduce fever, relieve headaches and body aches, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
